snippets.comment: Online hybrid class. Only 2 "lectures" posted over 7 weeks, were just videos from the online textbook. Had to teach myself chapter 6 before hearing mid term was three chapters. Not trying to teach myself this level of math.

Professor Klassen is an outstanding instructor due to reasons many find difficulty with. It is a teacher's duty to hold their students to a standard that is exceptional, but within their grasp. She understands this well, and executes this expectation with conviction. Her devotion to her student's pr
Professor Klassen is a huge bully. She will make you feel bad for asking questions and will make remarks about your lack of preparation in front of the whole class.
